habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Sprint (Ex) Once per hour, a cheetah can move at 10 times its normal speed (500 feet) when it makes a charge.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Sprint (Ex) Once per hour, a cheetah can move at 10 times its normal speed (500 feet) when it makes a charge.

fullStatBlock:
CR 2
Cheetah
